name: Carson City MAC Center
description: Come play pickleball at Carson City MAC Center in Carson City, NV! There are 12 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, wheelchair accessibility, water, and lights.
fees: Fee required — Daily drop in fee for open play, buy a punch card or invest in a membership.

name: Mills Park Pickleball Complex - Carson City, Nevada
description: As of August 2025, there are a total of 14 courts with permanent nets at this location. Six of the courts are new and individually fenced. There are five gates, with combination locks to prevent vandalism. The code is 1492. If you're the last group leaving the courts, please lock the gate(s).
open_play_schedule: Mornings are very popular with most of our players. Evenings can also be good if there's no wind.

name: Silver State Athletic Center
